title: stelis ocreosa
intro: Stelis ocreosa, also known as the Ocreosa Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis ocreosa include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
